description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly dark, with contrasting light-colored interior partitions visible through the open plan. The layout features multiple rooms, including what appears to be a main living area, several smaller rooms, and a hallway, all separated by internal walls. There are several window and door openings distributed along the perimeter, with a main entrance likely located on the shorter side. The structure is constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with large open spaces and minimal decorative elements. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat roof, dark exterior walls, and a simple, open interior layout divided into multiple rooms.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from a short side, highlighting the main entrance and a clear view of the internal room divisions.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the long side of the bungalow, emphasizing the length of the structure and the arrangement of windows and doors along the facade.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite short side, revealing additional room partitions and a secondary entrance or window.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the rear long side, with fewer openings and a more solid wall appearance compared to the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows along the perimeter
